# widgetctl

widgetctl is a command-line tool for managing widget inventories on small teams.

Use it when you want a single binary to add, list, and prune widgets across machines.

## Install

```bash
brew install widgetctl
```

## Usage

Run `widgetctl list` to view widgets in the current directory.
